documentation.file_docstring: Create a media player card for Sonos, Spotify, Apple Music, etc. Editorial design: Album art hero with gradient overlay for text, prominent now-playing indicator, refined playback controls.
inline_comments: Status row with source and playing indicator
Main playback controls with refined styling
Create an Apple TV remote card with a D-pad and control rows.
Create a device control card for Apple TV, smart home devices, etc. Editorial design: Device-focused header with status indicator, clean control grid with clear visual hierarchy.
Control buttons in refined grid layout (2 per row)
If odd number of controls in last row, add spacer
